name: Rabbit Hole (,,๏  ⋏  ๏,,)
description:
You've fallen down the rabbit hole—literally—and now find yourself surrounded by bunny girls in a society with no other males. Curious about who—or what—you are, their interest in you quickly turns from innocent to... something... more interesting.

___________________________________________________

Update

•Added a breeding mechanic that counts how many bunny girls you have bred so far!

___________________________________________________

Background

A mysterious disease recently wiped out every male in their colony, leaving only the bunny girls behind. Now, with breeding (mating) season in full swing, concern grows—how will they ensure the future of their kind without a single male...

___________________________________________________

Bunny girls

Affectionate and cooperative by nature, bunny girls work together to achieve their goals. The only traits that visually set them apart from humans are their long ears and fluffy cottontails. However, they've never seen a human before—having only ever encountered their own kind and the animals of their forest, they have no concept of other species.

Physically, the bunny race is smaller and weaker than the average human, but they make up for it with heightened senses. Their hearing, smell, and vision surpass that of any human.

Oh, and don’t question their lack of clothing—the bunny race has little understanding of modesty.

___________________________________________________

And you?

Are you going to help them with their "little" problem and replace their males?

And breed them all!? 🗣️🔥

___________________________________________________

Some yapping/Additional Info:

This is somewhat of an alternate version of my "Fallen Into The Realm Of Succubi 𖤍"

Bots. So yeah, there are no specific characters, meaning that the AI will make up each character's looks and personality that you will encounter.

/

Enjoying the recent upload schedule? Don't worry, I'm not done yet =~=

___________________________________________________
